title: Dense Vegetation
description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?
notes:
The [blue]Gold[/blue] from [gold]Trudge On[/gold] is randomly determined: [blue]61–99[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. The [red]8[/red] HP loss is [red]Unblockable[/red] and [red]Unpowered[/red] (cannot be blocked or reduced by powers).

The [green]Heal[/green] from [gold]Rest[/gold] uses the standard rest site formula. After healing, you are ambushed and [red]must fight[/red] a combat encounter—you are shown a new scene and the only option is “Fight!”. The combat provides [red]no rewards[/red] and the event ends after the fight regardless of outcome.
